ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sensor_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor data entry */,
  "machine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the machine from which the data is collected */,
  "sensor_installation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor installation associated with the data */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Date and time when the data was collected */,
  "raw_x" REAL /* Raw measurement in the X direction */,
  "raw_y" REAL /* Raw measurement in the Y direction */,
  "raw_z" REAL /* Raw measurement in the Z direction */,
  "normal_force" REAL /* Normal force exerted on the sensor */,
  "dir_cos_x" REAL /* Directional cosine in the X direction */,
  "degree_x" REAL /* Angle in degrees for the X direction */,
  "dir_cos_y" REAL /* Directional cosine in the Y direction */,
  "degree_y" REAL /* Angle in degrees for the Y direction */,
  "dir_cos_z" REAL /* Directional cosine in the Z direction */,
  "degree_z" REAL /* Angle in degrees for the Z direction */,
  "data_quality_score" REAL /* Score indicating the quality of the data (0-1) */,
  "is_anomaly" INTEGER /* Indicates if the data is an anomaly (true/false) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_data_sensor_installation_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_installation_id") REFERENCES sensor_installations ("installation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_data_machine_id FOREIGN KEY ("machine_id") REFERENCES machines ("machine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "machines" (
  "machine_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each machine */,
  "machine_name" TEXT /* Name of the machine */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the machine within the facility */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the machine (e.g., active, inactive, maintenance) */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the machine */,
  "model_number" TEXT /* Model number of the machine */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the machine */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the machine was installed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("machine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the related sensor data */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., high vibration, low normal force) */,
  "alert_description" TEXT /* Description of the alert */,
  "alert_time" TEXT /* Date and time the alert was triggered */,
  "priority_level" TEXT /* Priority level of the alert (e.g., critical, warning, info) */,
  "resolved" INTEGER /* Indicates if the alert is resolved (true/false) */,
  "resolved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who resolved the alert */,
  "resolution_time" TEXT /* Date and time the alert was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES sensor_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for login */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., operator, analyst, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "machine_maintenance" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "machine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the machine that was serviced */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date and time when maintenance was performed */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance activity */,
  "performed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the maintenance */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance (e.g., routine, corrective, preventive) */,
  "parts_replaced" TEXT /* List of parts replaced during maintenance */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the maintenance activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_machine_maintenance_machine_id FOREIGN KEY ("machine_id") REFERENCES machines ("machine_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_machine_maintenance_performed_by FOREIGN KEY ("performed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_types" (
  "sensor_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor type */,
  "sensor_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the sensor type (e.g., accelerometer, pressure sensor) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sensor type and its application */,
  "unit_of_measurement" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the sensor readings (e.g., m/s^2, psi) */,
  "measurement_range" TEXT /* Measurement range of the sensor (e.g., 0-100 m/s^2, 0-100 psi) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_installations" (
  "installation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor installation record */,
  "machine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the machine where the sensor is installed */,
  "sensor_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor type installed */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the sensor was installed */,
  "installed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who installed the sensor */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the sensor was last calibrated */,
  "calibration_status" TEXT /* Calibration status of the sensor (e.g., calibrated, needs calibration) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("installation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_installations_sensor_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_type_id") REFERENCES sensor_types ("sensor_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_installations_machine_id FOREIGN KEY ("machine_id") REFERENCES machines ("machine_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_installations_installed_by FOREIGN KEY ("installed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric record */,
  "machine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the machine associated with the metrics */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp for the metrics data */,
  "avg_raw_x" REAL /* Average raw X reading over a period */,
  "avg_raw_y" REAL /* Average raw Y reading over a period */,
  "avg_raw_z" REAL /* Average raw Z reading over a period */,
  "avg_normal_force" REAL /* Average normal force over a period */,
  "vibration_level" REAL /* Vibration level of the machine (e.g., 0-100) */,
  "overall_health_score" REAL /* Overall health score of the machine (e.g., 0-100) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_machine_id FOREIGN KEY ("machine_id") REFERENCES machines ("machine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user who performed the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., login, logout, data access) */,
  "activity_description" TEXT /* Description of the activity */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Date and time when the activity occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id")
)
